description: Happy path: mid-budget intermediate DIY project returns full categorized list with cost ranges and safety flags

expect.materials: array of objects each with item, category, quantity, estimated_cost_range, notes
expect.tools: array of objects each with item, essential, safety_required, notes
expect.safety_flags: safety_required true for items involving paint, spray, sanding, or heat
expect.estimated_cost_range_format: all ranges use 'to' not dashes (e.g. '$15 to $30')
expect.estimated_total_range: present with a plain-language caveat about estimates
expect.optional_upgrades: array of 3 or fewer items with item, why, estimated_cost_range

prohibit: renter_notes present when renter_friendly is false
estimated_cost_range using a dash instead of 'to'

description: Minimal required inputs: beginner low-budget project with renter_friendly true includes renter_notes

expect.materials: array present with thrift, dollar-store, or DIY alternatives surfaced for low budget
expect.tools: array present with beginner-friendly guidance in notes
expect.renter_notes: null because renter_friendly was not passed (defaults to false)

prohibit: premium or splurge material suggestions in a low budget tier
safety_required items without PPE or ventilation notes

description: Edge case: renter_friendly true excludes permanent modifications and flags non-reversible items

input.project_title: stylized accent wall with vintage frames

expect.renter_notes: non-null string covering reversibility, damage-free alternatives, and items to skip or substitute
expect.materials: items that require permanent modification are flagged or substituted with renter-safe alternatives

prohibit: permanent paint recommended without renter warning when renter_friendly is true
drilling or wall anchors listed without damage-free alternative or flag
renter_notes absent or null when renter_friendly is true
em dashes in any output field
